'''Mickey "Guāng-xī" Chún''' is a mixed Zhengfanese/Borginian detective. Hir goal as a detective is to help end discrimination in the legal world and bring justice to those who deserve it.

= Biography =

== Bully Patrol Mickey Chún ==
As a child, Guāng-xī always wanted to be a good cop. Hir mother would always tell hir about how badly the cops treated her when she was growing up, and ze wanted to change that.

From kindergarten to third grade, ze pretended to be an officer and patrolled the classroom searching for bullies. When someone was being bullied, ze would step in and tell the bully to back off.
This is where hir habit of "criticizing [sic] others for pissing [hir] off" came from.

== Ada ==
In second grade, Guāng-xī shared a homeroom class with a young girl by the name of Ada Fender. 

== Joining the Force ==
At 16, ze graduated early in high school and earned a Bachelor's in (think of this later) at 18, pursuing a job as a police officer in hopes to be promoted to detective.

This decision, as expected, was not completely met with excitement. Hir mother forced hir to repeatedly promise to not become corrupt and stick with hir promise to bring justice to those with bigger advantages.

== Reunion with "Ada" ==


= Personality =
Guāng-xī, to put it simply (and a bit vulgarly), is '''not''' someone you want to fuck with.

== Berating Others ==
Ze is often described as a bully who will pinpoint one's insecurities to use against them as reverse psychological manipulation into not sucking so much. However, ze knows where the line is drawn. If ze were to make a serious lapse in judgment while insulting another person, ze will do what ze can to make up for it. A very common target of
